plugins.NSHealthShareUsageDescription: SlopMiles reads running workouts, heart rate, routes, date of birth, and resting heart rate to personalize coaching.
plugins.NSHealthUpdateUsageDescription: SlopMiles can write completed coaching workouts to Health when enabled.
